ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "scoring_method" TEXT /* Scoring method used (e.g., Gross, Net) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee required for the tournament */,
  "max_teams" INTEGER /* Maximum number of teams allowed in the tournament */,
  "max_players_per_team" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed per team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "handicap" REAL /* Handicap of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the team is participating in */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_captain" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the team */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_players" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the team (e.g., Captain, Member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the round belongs to */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "round_date" TEXT /* Date the round was played */,
  "tee_time" TEXT /* Tee time for the round */,
  "course" TEXT /* Name of the golf course where the round is played */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round the score belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that scored */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the team */,
  "score_details" TEXT /* Detailed score information (e.g., hole-by-hole scores) */,
  "score_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the score was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the leaderboard belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team in the leaderboard */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Current points of the team */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the leaderboard was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the prize belongs to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank that the prize is awarded to */,
  "prize_amount" REAL /* Amount of the prize */,
  "prize_description" TEXT /* Description of the prize */,
  "prize_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the prize image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prizes_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, player) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_prizes" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the prize was awarded to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Prize, Leaderboard Update) */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification (0 for unread, 1 for read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
